title: GECOM30 - Product Master Data

EnumTRTEXC.description: Movement processing code / 1 = Create, 2 = Modify or Create, 9 = Cancellation
EnumTRTEXC.description_es: Código de procesamiento del movimiento / 1 = Crear, 2 = Modificar o crear, 9 = Cancelación

EnumMESPRO.description: Product measurement method / 1 = Fixed Weight, 2 = Variable Weight, 3 = Regulated Measurement
EnumMESPRO.description_es: Método de medición del producto / 1 = Peso fijo, 2 = Peso variable, 3 = Medición regulada
EnumMESPRO.description_en: Product measurement method / 1 = Fixed Weight, 2 = Variable Weight, 3 = Regulated Measurement

EnumMODREC.description_es: Modo de recepción / 1 = Palé completo, 2 = Unidad

EnumHOMGRB.description: Type of sheaf homogeneity (rack or bulk) / 0 = No date uniformity, 1 = Variable per day, 2 = Variable per week, 3 = Variable per decade, 4 = Variable per month, 5 = Single batch
EnumHOMGRB.description_es: Tipo de homogeneidad de apilado (estantería o a granel) / 0 = Sin uniformidad de fecha, 1 = Variable por día, 2 = Variable por semana, 3 = Variable por década, 4 = Variable por mes, 5 = Lote único
EnumHOMGRB.description_en: Type of sheaf homogeneity (rack or bulk) / 0 = No date uniformity, 1 = Variable per day, 2 = Variable per week, 3 = Variable per decade, 4 = Variable per month, 5 = Single batch

EnumTOPPRN.description: Indicator for composite or unit product / 0 = Unit Product, 1 = Bill of Materials
EnumTOPPRN.description_es: Indicador de producto compuesto o unitario / 0 = Producto unitario, 1 = Lista de materiales
EnumTOPPRN.description_en: Indicator for composite or unit product / 0 = Unit Product, 1 = Bill of Materials

EnumMETRPL.description: Product replacement method / 0 = No substitute, 1 = Substituted by..., 2 = Replaced by...
EnumMETRPL.description_es: Método de sustitución del producto / 0 = Sin sustituto, 1 = Sustituido por..., 2 = Reemplazado por...
EnumMETRPL.description_en: Product replacement method / 0 = No substitute, 1 = Substituted by..., 2 = Replaced by...

EnumUNIARR.description: Upper rounding unit / 1 = Pallet, 2 = Layer, 3 = PCB, 4 = SPCB, 5 = CSU
EnumUNIARR.description_es: Unidad de redondeo superior / 1 = Palé, 2 = Capa, 3 = PCB, 4 = SPCB, 5 = UVC
EnumUNIARR.description_en: Upper rounding unit / 1 = Pallet, 2 = Layer, 3 = PCB, 4 = SPCB, 5 = CSU

EnumUNICAL.description: Hazardous materials quantity calculation unit / 1 = Net weight, 2 = Gross weight, 3 = Volume
EnumUNICAL.description_es: Unidad de cálculo de cantidad de materiales peligrosos / 1 = Peso neto, 2 = Peso bruto, 3 = Volumen
EnumUNICAL.description_en: Hazardous materials quantity calculation unit / 1 = Net weight, 2 = Gross weight, 3 = Volume

EnumEMBCLQ.description_es: Tipo de embalaje LQ / 1 = Caja, 2 = Palé

EnumEDIQLF.description: EDI code qualifier / 0 = CSU, 1 = Multi-product batch, 2 = SPCB, 3 = PCB, 4 = Box, 5 = Pallet
EnumEDIQLF.description_es: Calificador del código EDI / 0 = UVC, 1 = Lote multiproducto, 2 = SPCB, 3 = PCB, 4 = Caja, 5 = Palé
EnumEDIQLF.description_en: EDI code qualifier / 0 = CSU, 1 = Multi-product batch, 2 = SPCB, 3 = PCB, 4 = Box, 5 = Pallet

EnumTYPRIC.description: Applied regulation / 0 = ICPE only, 1 = SEVESO only, 2 = ICPE and SEVESO, 9 = heading
EnumTYPRIC.description_es: Reglamentación aplicada / 0 = Solo ICPE, 1 = Solo SEVESO, 2 = ICPE y SEVESO, 9 = epígrafe
EnumTYPRIC.description_en: Applied regulation / 0 = ICPE only, 1 = SEVESO only, 2 = ICPE and SEVESO, 9 = heading

EnumTYPRUB.description: Section type / 1 = EDIFACT standard, 2 = Internal coding
EnumTYPRUB.description_es: Tipo de rúbrica / 1 = Estándar EDIFACT, 2 = Codificación interna
EnumTYPRUB.description_en: Section type / 1 = EDIFACT standard, 2 = Internal coding
